items.title_en: Fertitta-owned firm to buy Caesars Entertainment in nearly $18 billion leisure push
items.title_zh: Fertitta 旗下公司将收购凯撒娱乐公司 (Caesars Entertainment)，斥资近 180 亿美元推动休闲娱乐业务
items.desc_en: The deal, which will take one of the Las Vegas Strip's most prized casino operators private, includes about $11.9 billion in assumed debt, the companies said.
items.desc_zh: 两家公司表示，这笔交易将使拉斯维加斯大道上最受推崇的赌场运营商之一私有化，其中包括约 119 亿美元的承担债务。

items.title_en: Core inflation hit an annual rate of 3.3% in April, as expected, Fed’s preferred gauge shows
items.title_zh: 美联储首选指标显示，4月份核心通胀年率达到3.3%，符合预期
items.desc_en: The PCE price index for April was expected to show an annual inflation rate of 3.8% for all items and 3.3% for core.
items.desc_zh: 4 月份 PCE 价格指数预计显示所有项目年通胀率为 3.8%，核心通胀率为 3.3%。

items.title_en: Kohl's stock spikes more than 15% as slumping retailer says sales trends are improving
items.title_zh: Kohl’s 股价飙升逾 15%，业绩下滑的零售商表示销售趋势正在改善
items.desc_en: Kohl's reported its best comparable sales growth in four years on Thursday even as it saw revenue decline.
items.desc_zh: 周四，科尔士百货公布了四年来最好的可比销售额增长，尽管其收入有所下降。

items.title_en: More monthly auto loan payments are above $1,000, and most are not for luxury models
items.title_zh: 每月汽车贷款还款额在1000美元以上的较多，且大多数并非豪华车型
items.desc_en: The top five models for the $1,000-plus payments were popular pickup trucks including the Ford F-150, Chevrolet Silverado 1500 and Ram 1500.
items.desc_zh: 支付 1,000 美元以上的前五名车型是受欢迎的皮卡车，包括福特 F-150、雪佛兰 Silverado 1500 和 Ram 1500。

items.title_zh: Oura 推出迄今为止最小的智能戒指，将可穿戴设计缩小 40%
items.desc_en: Oura, the smart ring maker, is set to launch what it says will be the smallest smart ring available in the growing wearables market.
items.desc_zh: 智能戒指制造商 Oura 将推出据称是不断增长的可穿戴设备市场中最小的智能戒指。

items.title_en: EU fines Temu €200m for allowing sale of illegal products
items.title_zh: Temu因允许销售非法产品而被欧盟罚款2亿欧元
items.desc_en: The European Commission says the Chinese-owned online retailer failed to take account of risks from baby toys and faulty chargers sold on its platform.
items.desc_zh: 欧盟委员会表示，这家中国在线零售商未能考虑到其平台上销售的婴儿玩具和有缺陷充电器的风险。

items.title_zh: 盘前涨幅最大的股票：Snowflake、Best Buy、Kohl's、Dollar Tree 等
items.desc_en: These are the stocks posting the largest moves premarket.
items.desc_zh: 这些是盘前涨幅最大的股票。

items.title_en: Trump Accounts app launches — here's how to get started
items.title_zh: 特朗普账户应用程序启动——以下是如何开始
items.desc_en: Families can now download a Trump Accounts app to track the new investment accounts, which offer a $1,000 pilot program contribution for eligible children.
items.desc_zh: 家庭现在可以下载 Trump Accounts 应用程序来跟踪新的投资账户，该账户为符合条件的儿童提供 1,000 美元的试点计划捐款。

items.title_en: Best Buy beats on top and bottom lines as retailer aims to reinvigorate sales
items.title_zh: 百思买的目标是重振销售，其营收和利润均表现出色
items.desc_en: Best Buy reported better-than-expected earnings on Thursday as the company works toward turning around its sales slump.
items.desc_zh: 百思买周四公布的盈利好于预期，该公司正努力扭转销售下滑的局面。

items.title_en: More workers are raiding their 401(k)s as average balances fall, Fidelity says
items.title_zh: 富达表示，随着平均余额下降，越来越多的工人正在抢夺他们的 401(k) 福利
items.desc_en: Retirement account balances sank at the start of 2026 amid market swings, according to Fidelity. At the same time, more savers tapped their accounts for cash.
items.desc_zh: 富达 (Fidelity) 表示，由于市场波动，退休账户余额在 2026 年初下降。与此同时，更多储户动用账户提取现金。

items.title_en: Man arrested after three injured in stabbing at Swiss train station
items.title_zh: 瑞士火车站刺伤三人受伤男子被捕
items.desc_en: The suspect, a 31-year-old Swiss man, has been arrested, police say, as areas around the station are cordoned off.
items.desc_zh: 警方称，由于车站周围地区已被封锁，嫌疑人是一名 31 岁的瑞士男子，他已被逮捕。

items.title_en: CVS to restore coverage of Zepbound, add Eli Lilly's obesity pill to drug plans
items.title_zh: CVS 将恢复 Zepbound 的覆盖范围，将礼来公司的减肥药添加到药物计划中
items.desc_en: CVS will add Zepbound coverage on Oct. 1, and start covering Lilly's newly approved Foundayo pill on June 1.
items.desc_zh: CVS 将于 10 月 1 日增加 Zepbound 承保范围，并于 6 月 1 日开始承保礼来公司新批准的 Foundayo 药丸。

items.title_en: Oil markets are betting on a swift end to the Iran war. Investors may regret it
items.title_zh: 石油市场押注伊朗战争将迅速结束。投资者可能会后悔
items.desc_en: Oil markets remain volatile as traders struggle to interpret contradictory signals on prospects for U.S.-Iran peace agreement.
items.desc_zh: 由于交易员难以解读有关美伊和平协议前景的矛盾信号，石油市场仍然波动。

items.title_en: Ro Khanna is taking his economic message on the road. Will it lead to the White House?
items.title_zh: 罗·卡纳正在路上传递他的经济信息。它会通往白宫吗？
items.desc_en: Rep. Ro Khanna wasn't in the Rust Belt to campaign. But he could be soon.
items.desc_zh: 众议员罗·卡纳 (Ro Khanna) 并未前往铁锈地带竞选。但他可能很快就会做到。

items.title_zh: Valve 将 Steam Deck 价格上调 40% 以上，原因是成本上涨
items.desc_en: The gaming giant said the handheld had not changed but the rise reflected "the current state of component costs"
items.desc_zh: 这家游戏巨头表示，掌上电脑没有改变，但上涨反映了“组件成本的现状”

items.desc_zh: Snowflake 正在深入研究亚马逊的网络服务，并计划使用其基于 Arm 的 Graviton 芯片。

items.title_en: Jill Biden says she thought husband was 'having a stroke' during 2024 debate
items.title_zh: 吉尔·拜登表示，她认为丈夫在 2024 年辩论中“中风”
items.desc_en: The former US first lady told CBS News that she was frightened by Joe Biden's performance against Donald Trump.
items.desc_zh: 这位美国前第一夫人告诉哥伦比亚广播公司新闻，她对乔·拜登对阵唐纳德·特朗普的表现感到害怕。

items.title_en: Matthew Perry's assistant jailed for 41 months over actor's ketamine death
items.title_zh: 马修·佩里 (Matthew Perry) 助理因氯胺酮致死被判入狱 41 个月
items.desc_en: Kenneth Iwamasa, who pleaded guilty last year to one count of conspiracy to distribute ketamine causing death, said he "will forever regret" his actions.
items.desc_zh: 肯尼思·岩正(Kenneth Iwamasa)去年承认了一项共谋分发氯胺酮致人死亡的罪名，他表示，他“将永远后悔”自己的行为。

items.title_en: Israel orders evacuation of Lebanese city as conflict with Hezbollah escalates
items.title_zh: 由于与真主党的冲突升级，以色列下令撤离黎巴嫩城市
items.desc_en: Israel's military tells residents of Tyre it will "act forcefully" against the armed group, after another wave of strikes in south and east Lebanon.
items.desc_zh: 在黎巴嫩南部和东部发动另一波袭击后，以色列军方告诉提尔居民，将“采取强有力的行动”打击该武装组织。

items.desc_zh: 您可以自行托管的实时文本转语音模型

items.title_en: Five people found alive after week trapped in flooded Laos cave
items.title_zh: 老挝洞穴被淹一周后，五人被发现生还
items.desc_en: The search is continuing for a further two villagers who are still missing, rescuers say.
items.desc_zh: 救援人员称，对另外两名仍然失踪的村民的搜寻仍在继续。

items.title_en: Ebola-hit DR Congo faces 'catastrophic collision' of disease and conflict, WHO warns
items.title_zh: 世卫组织警告称，遭受埃博拉病毒袭击的刚果民主共和国面临疾病与冲突的“灾难性碰撞”
items.desc_en: Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus said fighting in DR Congo was hampering efforts to stop spread
items.desc_zh: 谭德塞表示，刚果民主共和国的战斗阻碍了阻止疫情蔓延的努力

items.title_en: Porn company fined £600,000 by Ofcom over age check failings
items.title_zh: 色情公司因年龄检查失败被 Ofcom 罚款 60 万英镑
items.desc_en: Ofcom said Youngtek Solutions Ltd did not have checks between July and September 2025, but has since brought in verification.
items.desc_zh: Ofcom 表示，Youngtek Solutions Ltd 在 2025 年 7 月至 9 月期间没有进行检查，但此后进行了验证。

items.title_en: Champion ethical hacker warns AI tools like Mythos could put her out of business
items.title_zh: 道德黑客冠军警告像 Mythos 这样的人工智能工具可能会让她破产
items.desc_en: Chompie, one of the world's tops ethical hackers, says AI like Claude Mythos will make it harder for people like her to compete.
items.desc_zh: Chompie 是世界顶级道德黑客之一，她表示像 Claude Mythos 这样的人工智能将使像她这样的人更难竞争。

items.title_en: Instagram betting ads featuring Kane and Haaland banned
items.title_zh: 凯恩和哈兰德的 Instagram 投注广告被禁止
items.desc_en: The advertising watchdog said the adverts featuring top footballers had a strong appeal to under-18s.
items.desc_zh: 广告监管机构表示，以顶级足球运动员为主角的广告对 18 岁以下青少年有很强的吸引力。

items.title_en: Three killed and dozens injured in Israeli strike on Gaza City, medics and witnesses say
items.title_zh: 医务人员和目击者称，以色列对加沙城的袭击造成三人死亡、数十人受伤
items.desc_en: Israel says it was targeting a Hamas commander whose predecessor was killed in a similar strike earlier in May.
items.desc_zh: 以色列表示，其目标是一名哈马斯指挥官，该指挥官的前任在五月初的一次类似袭击中被杀。

items.title_en: Government vows to bring in under-16 social media restrictions by end of year
items.title_zh: 政府誓言年底前对 16 岁以下儿童实施社交媒体限制
items.desc_en: Tech minister Liz Kendall told the BBC the government would publish a response to the consultation in the summer.
items.desc_zh: 科技部长莉兹·肯德尔 (Liz Kendall) 告诉英国广播公司 (BBC)，政府将在夏季发布对此次咨询的回应。

items.title_en: The rise of the fruit that tastes like custard
items.title_zh: 味道像奶油冻的水果的兴起
items.desc_en: Custard apple plants are prized for their hardiness but exporting their delicate fruit is difficult.
items.desc_zh: 番荔枝植物因其耐寒性而受到重视，但出口其精致的果实却很困难。

items.title_zh: Pitch Agent

items.desc_zh: 几秒钟内生成的品牌演示

items.title_en: From decades to years - AI could speed search for brain drugs hiding in plain sight
items.title_zh: 从几十年到几年——人工智能可以加速寻找隐藏在视线中的大脑药物
items.desc_en: Researchers hope the work will help identify affordable, effective drugs to treat conditions like MND.
items.desc_zh: 研究人员希望这项工作将有助于找到负担得起的、有效的药物来治疗 MND 等疾病。

items.title_en: Waymo pauses robotaxis in five US cities after cars drive into flooded roads
items.title_zh: 汽车驶入被洪水淹没的道路后，Waymo 在美国五个城市暂停了机器人出租车
items.desc_en: A Waymo spokesperson said it had expanded the temporary pause "out of an abundance of caution".
items.desc_zh: Waymo 发言人表示，“出于高度谨慎”，该公司扩大了暂时暂停的范围。

items.title_en: 'At a loss for words' - Destiny 2 fans react to news support is ending
items.title_zh: 《命运 2》粉丝对支持即将结束的消息反应“无言以对”
items.desc_en: Bungie said the online shooter will get its final update on 9 June but will still be playable.
items.desc_zh: Bungie 表示，这款在线射击游戏将于 6 月 9 日获得最终更新，但仍然可以玩。
